description_long: This object is a stylized, artificial Christmas tree with a geometric, multi-panel construction. The tree is composed of several flat, vertical panels arranged in a radial pattern, each panel featuring a printed image of a green pine tree with white snow accents. The panels are primarily white on the outer edges, with the green tree imagery dominating the central portions. The overall shape is cylindrical with a star-like cross-section, giving the illusion of a full tree from multiple angles. There are no visible ornaments, string lights, or a tree topper, and the base is not clearly defined. The design is minimalistic and modern, likely intended for decorative use in urban public spaces or commercial environments.
description: A geometric, multi-panel artificial Christmas tree with printed green pine and snow imagery on white panels, arranged in a radial star-like pattern. The design is minimalistic and modern, with no visible ornaments or topper.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central green pine tree image with white snow accents, flanked by white panel edges.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, revealing more of the radial panel structure and the continuation of the tree imagery across adjacent panels.
description_view_2: Side view highlights the star-like cross-section and the repetitive tree pattern on each panel.
description_view_3: Another angled view, similar to view 1, showing the geometric arrangement and consistent tree imagery.
